options.systemMessage:
=Extrae del PDF y el XML proporcionados la siguiente información:
	•	Tipo: Factura o Nota Crédito
	•	Número de factura
	•	Fecha de emisión (formato: YYYY-MM-DD)
	•	NIT del emisor (sin dígito de verificación, solo los números antes del guion)
	•	NIT del receptor (sin dígito de verificación)
	•	Razón social del emisor
	•	Valor antes de IVA
	•	Valor del IVA
	•	Valor total de la factura
	•	CUFE
	•	Resumen de la compra (máximo 20 palabras, describiendo en términos generales qué se compró, usando solo mayúsculas donde corresponda gramaticalmente. Ejemplo: “CONSULTA DE PRIMERA VEZ POR OPTOMETRIA” → “Consulta de primera vez por optometría”)

Verifica que:
Valor total = Valor antes de IVA + Valor del IVA, usando la herramienta Calculator.

nodes.name: Sticky Note

parameters.content:
# 🧾 Colombian electronic invoices processing

This N8N workflow automates the extraction and organization of **personal electronic invoices** in Colombia received via **Gmail**. It includes the following key steps:

## 🔁 Flow Summary

1. **Email Trigger**
   - Polls Gmail every **30 minutes** for emails with `.zip` attachments (assumed to contain invoices).
   - Following DIAN requirements in Colombia

2. **ZIP File Handling**
   - Extracts all files.
   - Filters only **PDF** and **XML** files for processing.

3. **Data Extraction & Processing**
   - Uses **LangChain Agent + OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini)** to extract:
     - Tipo de documento (Factura / Nota Crédito)
     - Número de factura
     - Fecha de emisión (YYYY-MM-DD)
     - NIT emisor y receptor (sin dígito de verificación)
     - Razón social del emisor
     - Subtotal, IVA, Total
     - CUFE
     - Resumen de compra (max 20 words, formatted sentence)

4. **Validation**
   - Ensures **Total = Subtotal + IVA** using a calculator node.

5. **Storage**
   - Uploads the original PDF to **Google Drive**.
   - Renames the file to: `YYYY-MM-DD-NUMERO_FACTURA.pdf`.
   - Inserts or updates invoice details in **Google Sheets** using a unique `Key` (`NIT_Emisor + Numero_Factura`) to prevent duplication.

---

> ⚙️ Designed for personal use with minimal latency tolerance and high automation reliability.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

	•	Razón social del emisor
	•	Valor antes de IVA
	•	Valor del IVA
	•	Valor total de la factura
	•	CUFE
	•	Resumen de la compra (máximo 20 palabras, describiendo en términos generales qué se compró, usando solo mayúsculas donde corresponda gramaticalmente. Ejemplo: “CONSULTA DE PRIMERA VEZ POR OPTOMETRIA” → “Consulta de primera vez por optometría”)

# 🧾 Colombian electronic invoices processing

This N8N workflow automates the extraction and organization of **personal electronic invoices** in Colombia received via **Gmail**. It includes the following key steps:

## 🔁 Flow Summary

1. **Email Trigger**
   - Polls Gmail every **30 minutes** for emails with `.zip` attachments (assumed to contain invoices).
   - Following DIAN requirements in Colombia

2. **ZIP File Handling**
   - Extracts all files.
   - Filters only **PDF** and **XML** files for processing.

3. **Data Extraction & Processing**
   - Uses **LangChain Agent + OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini)** to extract:
     - Tipo de documento (Factura / Nota Crédito)
     - Número de factura
     - Fecha de emisión (YYYY-MM-DD)
     - NIT emisor y receptor (sin dígito de verificación)
     - Razón social del emisor
     - Subtotal, IVA, Total
     - CUFE
     - Resumen de compra (max 20 words, formatted sentence)

4. **Validation**
   - Ensures **Total = Subtotal + IVA** using a calculator node.

5. **Storage**
   - Uploads the original PDF to **Google Drive**.
   - Renames the file to: `YYYY-MM-DD-NUMERO_FACTURA.pdf`.
   - Inserts or updates invoice details in **Google Sheets** using a unique `Key` (`NIT_Emisor + Numero_Factura`) to prevent duplication.

---

> ⚙️ Designed for personal use with minimal latency tolerance and high automation reliability.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: open Ai  A P I details
google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "On Email receipt".
Open the "Loop Over Items" node (n8n-nodes-base.splitInBatches) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "OpenAI Chat Model" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Calculator" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Structured Output Parser" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Filter ZIP files only" node (n8n-nodes-base.filter) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Unzip Invoice" node (n8n-nodes-base.compression) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Just for style" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Split XML and PDF" node (n8n-nodes-base.switch) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Extract PDF Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.extractFromFile) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Extract XML Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.extractFromFile) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Convert to JSON" node (n8n-nodes-base.xml) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Append both Docs" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Aggregate all Data into 1 list" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Extract Data from PDF and XML" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Create initial PDF" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Merge both flows" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Update PDF with actual name" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Create or update row" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Incoming triggers will qualified/formatted, new rows will be written to Google Sheets, and email replies or alerts will be sent automatically.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
